title: The First Awakening
description: The king's golem has been tested with five ingredients. Use the reaction results and mixing records to determine which two ingredients will animate it.

hints.text:
The golem chest reacts to LARGE Red ingredients; the ears react to SMALL Green ingredients.
Known SIZE reactions:
  ing1: chest ✓ ears ✓ → reacts to both
  ing2: chest ✗ ears ✓ → ears-only
  ing3: chest ✓ ears ✓ → reacts to both
  ing4: chest ✗ ears ✓ → ears-only
  ing7: chest ✗ ears ✗ → non-reactive
Animation is SIGN-based, not SIZE-based. Chest=R/Large → animSign='+'. Ears=G/Small → animSign='−'. Animators must have R+ sign AND G- sign. Use the mixing records to determine which ingredients have those signs.

Step 1 — mix(ing3, ing4) = R+:
  ing3 reacts to chest (R-Large) and ears (G-Small). Candidates: Nnp or Ppn.
  ing4 reacts to ears only. The R+ result narrows it: only mix(Ppn, pnP) = R+.
  → ing3 = Ppn, ing4 = pnP. pnP has R+ and G- → ANIMATOR.

Step 2 — mix(ing2, ing3) = B-:
  ing3 = Ppn confirmed. mix(npN, Ppn) = B-. → ing2 = npN (R-, not an animator).

Step 3 — mix(ing4, ing7) = G-:
  ing4 = pnP confirmed. mix(pnP, pNn) = G-. → ing7 = pNn. pNn has R+ and G- → ANIMATOR.

The animators are ing4 and ing7.
  ing4 → pnP: R+S G-S B+L — R-sign=+ ✓, G-sign=− ✓. Animator.
  ing7 → pNn: R+S G-L B-S — R-sign=+ ✓, G-sign=− ✓. Animator.
  (ing1 reacts to both SIZE-wise but is Nnp: R- ✗ — not an animator.)
